title: Safe handling of chemicals - Canada.ca
content:
## Safe handling of chemicals
Information on labelling workplace chemicals, Canada's hazard communication standard and chemicals management programs.

## Services and information

### Labelling of chemicals for the workplace
Learn about the global standard for classifying workplace chemicals and communicating hazard information through labels and safety data sheets.

### Workplace Hazardous Materials Information System
Understand Canada's national standard for communicating information about hazardous materials.
- Environment and Climate Change Canada
